root_causes: camera velocity look-ahead pushed the trailing swarm under the production HUD
full anti-aliased unit rings accumulated translucent edge pixels in dense overlap
minimap pulse and chunk alpha transitions introduced stepped temporal changes
fixed-pixel HUD layout ignored mobile safe areas and alternate landscape aspect ratios
global custom input controls lacked a modal interaction gate
engine_runtime_test_reason: Godot 4.6.3 executable is not installed in the build container and the official binary could not be materialized in this environment.
